api_key.description: Picqer API key, sent as the HTTP Basic auth username (password left blank). Never logged.

username.description: Fallback plain-config API key/username, used only when the api_key secret is unset (matches legacy's firstNonEmpty(secret, config.username) precedence).

password.description: Optional HTTP Basic auth password. Picqer's own API convention leaves this blank.

organization_name.description: Picqer subdomain; the connector always derives https://<organization_name>.picqer.com/api/v1 from it. Legacy also accepted a raw base_url override for tests/proxies; this bundle narrows to organization_name-only since the engine's base-URL field is a single non-conditional template (see docs.md Known limits).

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
